formulas.formula: CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CAST(ProcessDate AS TIMESTAMP), 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT)
formulas.expression_raw: CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CAST(bps.ProcessDate AS TIMESTAMP), 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) AS DateID

formulas.formula: CID
formulas.expression_raw: dp.CID AS RealCID
1 AS Portfolio_Only

formulas.formula: MAX(CASE WHEN COALESCE(MirrorID, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
formulas.expression_raw: MAX(CASE WHEN COALESCE(f.MirrorID, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Portfolio_Only_Manual

formulas.formula: MAX(CASE WHEN COALESCE(MirrorID, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(InstrumentTypeID, 0) IN (1, 2, 4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
formulas.expression_raw: MAX(CASE WHEN COALESCE(f.MirrorID, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(f.InstrumentTypeID, 0) IN (1, 2, 4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Portfolio_Only_CFD_Manual

formulas.formula: MAX(CASE WHEN COALESCE(MirrorID, 0) = 0 AND COALESCE(InstrumentTypeID, 0) IN (10) AND COALESCE(IsSettled, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
